stemHtml: An aircraft is in distress and is transmitting this to ATC. In the meantime, you develop an urgency situation. When are you allowed to transmit your urgency?

options.a: After Aircraft A transmits its distress call.
options.c: You can not transmit until the distress situation is resolved.
options.d: You can only transmit once your situation worsens and becomes a MAYDAY.
